roles.name: System Admin
roles.description: Full administrative access to all monitoring, alerts, blockchain ledger, and configuration modules.

roles.name: Plant Engineer
roles.description: Operational role for configuring dashboards and alert rules, with read-only access to the blockchain ledger.

roles.name: External Auditor
roles.description: Read-only access for external audits with visibility into dashboards, alerts, and blockchain ledger.

roles.name: Read-only Viewer
roles.description: Internal viewer role with read-only access to dashboards and alerts, without blockchain ledger access.

sites.name: Plant A
sites.description: Primary assembly plant with Assembly Line 1 monitored for temperature, vibration, and downtime.

sites.name: South Plant
sites.description: Southern region plant used for critical alert reporting and uptime analytics.

sites.name: Main Plant
sites.description: Headquarters production site with multiple lines including Production Line 1 and Line 3.

sites.name: North Facility
sites.description: Northern facility focused on energy-intensive equipment, used in energy analytics comparisons.

production_lines.name: Assembly Line 1
production_lines.description: Primary assembly line in Plant A, monitored for temperature, vibration, and unplanned downtime.

production_lines.name: Assembly Line 2
production_lines.description: Secondary assembly line in Plant A handling mixed-model production.

production_lines.name: Paint Line A
production_lines.description: Automated painting and curing line for finished assemblies.

production_lines.name: Boiler Loop A
production_lines.description: Steam generation loop containing Boiler-07 and related assets.

production_lines.name: Line 1
production_lines.description: Primary high-throughput production line in Main Plant used for uptime comparisons.

production_lines.name: Line 2
production_lines.description: Balanced throughput line at Main Plant for general-purpose assemblies.

production_lines.name: Line 3
production_lines.description: Flexible production line in Main Plant used in uptime analytics comparisons with Line 1.

production_lines.name: Pressing Line 1
production_lines.description: Metal pressing line handling bulk stamping operations.

production_lines.name: Pressing Line 2
production_lines.description: Pressing line that includes machine Press-12 and associated vibration sensors.

production_lines.name: South Mixing Line
production_lines.description: South Plant line for raw material mixing with frequent critical alerts tracked in reports.

production_lines.name: South Packaging Line
production_lines.description: Automated packaging and palletizing line at South Plant.

production_lines.name: South Utilities Loop
production_lines.description: Utility and support systems line monitored for critical alert duration reports.

production_lines.name: North Heavy Machining Cell
production_lines.description: Group of CNC machines at North Facility with high energy consumption profiles.

production_lines.name: North Press Line
production_lines.description: Energy-intensive press line used in energy analytics comparisons.

dashboards.name: Plant A – 7d Overview
dashboards.description: Seven-day overview of average temperature, vibration, and unplanned downtime for Assembly Line 1 in Plant A.

dashboards.name: North Facility – Energy 24h
dashboards.description: Energy monitoring dashboard highlighting the highest kWh-consuming machines in North Facility over the last 24 hours.

dashboards.name: Main Plant Uptime – Lines 1 & 3 (7d)
dashboards.description: Comparison dashboard showing uptime and OEE metrics for Line 1 and Line 3 in Main Plant over the last 7 days.

dashboards.name: South Plant – Alerts 30d
dashboards.description: Alert-focused dashboard for South Plant emphasizing critical events, durations, and patterns over the last 30 days.

machines.name: Boiler 07
machines.description: High-pressure steam boiler in Boiler Loop A monitored for over-temperature and pressure conditions.

machines.name: Assembly Line 1 Press 01
machines.description: Primary forming press on Assembly Line 1 with vibration and temperature sensors installed.

machines.name: Assembly Line 1 Main Drive Motor
machines.description: Main drive motor on Assembly Line 1, monitored for temperature and vibration trends.

machines.name: Assembly Line 2 Robot 01
machines.description: Six-axis robotic arm on Assembly Line 2 used for pick-and-place operations.

machines.name: Press 12
machines.description: High-tonnage mechanical press on Pressing Line 2, assigned to vibration sensor VIB-NEW-001.

machines.name: Press 08
machines.description: Mid-tonnage press on Pressing Line 1 used for smaller stamping operations.

machines.name: Line 1 Packer 01
machines.description: Automatic packing unit at the end of Production Line 1 used for uptime calculations.

machines.name: Line 3 Conveyor 02
machines.description: Secondary conveyor on Line 3, contributing to uptime metrics for the line.

machines.name: Machine MX-204
machines.description: Critical machine on Line 2 with maintenance transactions recorded on the blockchain ledger.

machines.name: South Mixer 01
machines.description: Primary raw material mixer in South Plant with history of critical alerts.

machines.name: South Mixer 02
machines.description: Backup mixer on South Mixing Line used during high demand periods.

machines.name: South Packaging 01
machines.description: Automated packaging cell in South Plant for finished goods.

machines.name: North Facility CNC 01
machines.description: High-power CNC milling machine with significant energy consumption.

machines.name: North Facility CNC 02
machines.description: CNC lathe in the heavy machining cell, often among the top energy consumers.

machines.name: North Press 21
machines.description: Large forging press on North Press Line with high kWh draw used in energy analytics.

machines.name: North Press 22
machines.description: Sister press to NF-Press-21, used for comparative energy monitoring.

saved_reports.name: South Critical 30d
saved_reports.description: Report of all Critical alerts in South Plant for the last 30 days where each alert lasted more than 10 minutes.

saved_reports.name: North Facility Energy 24h
saved_reports.description: Energy report showing average kWh consumption per machine in North Facility over the last 24 hours.

saved_reports.name: Main Uptime L1 vs L3 – 7d
saved_reports.description: Uptime comparison report between Production Line 1 and Line 3 in Main Plant over the last 7 days.

alert_rules.name: Boiler-07 Over-Temperature Medium
alert_rules.description: Triggers a medium severity alert when Boiler-07 temperature exceeds 85°C for more than 10 minutes.

alert_rules.name: Press-12 High Vibration
alert_rules.description: High severity vibration alert for Press-12 once vibration exceeds threshold for 2 minutes.

alert_rules.name: South Mixer 01 Critical Vibration
alert_rules.description: Critical vibration alert for South Mixer 01 when vibration remains above 10 mm/s for 3 minutes.

alert_rules.name: South Mixing Line Critical Downtime
alert_rules.description: Raises a critical alert when unplanned downtime on South Mixing Line exceeds 15 minutes.
alert_rules.scheduleDescription: Always active to capture all downtime events.

alert_rules.name: Main Line 1 Low Uptime
alert_rules.description: High severity alert if uptime for Main Plant Line 1 drops below 92%.
alert_rules.scheduleDescription: Evaluated once per hour during production shifts.

alert_rules.name: Main Line 3 Low Uptime
alert_rules.description: Medium severity alert if uptime for Main Plant Line 3 drops below 94%.
alert_rules.scheduleDescription: Evaluated once per hour during production shifts.

alert_rules.name: NF Press 21 Energy Spike
alert_rules.description: High severity alert when NF-Press-21 energy consumption spikes above 250 kWh in a 1-hour window.

alert_rules.name: MX-204 Low Uptime
alert_rules.description: Medium severity alert when MX-204 uptime falls below 90% over a 4-hour period.
alert_rules.scheduleDescription: Evaluated only during scheduled production hours.

alert_rules.name: Plant A High Average Temperature
alert_rules.description: Site-level alert if average Plant A process temperature exceeds 75°C.

alert_rules.name: Assembly Line 1 Unplanned Downtime
alert_rules.description: Medium severity alert when unplanned downtime on Assembly Line 1 exceeds 20 minutes in a shift.

alert_rules.name: South Packaging High Downtime
alert_rules.description: Low severity alert when South Packaging Line unplanned downtime exceeds 10 minutes.

alert_rules.name: NF CNC 02 High Energy
alert_rules.description: Medium severity alert when NF-CNC-02 hourly energy exceeds 200 kWh.
alert_rules.scheduleDescription: Always on for detailed energy analytics.

blockchain_transactions.payloadSummary: Quarterly preventive maintenance on MX-204 (lubrication, alignment, firmware check).
Corrective maintenance: replaced spindle bearings on MX-204.
Planned Q1 service on MX-204: inspection, lubrication, safety checks.
Start of production batch #Q1-204-01 on MX-204.
Boiler-07 safety valve inspection and calibration.
Routine visual inspection of Boiler-07 combustion chamber.
NF-CNC-01 switched to high-load machining program.
South Mixer 01 gearbox oil change and vibration baseline recording.
Initial installation and commissioning of Press-12.

alerts.name: South Mixer 01 vibration above 10 mm/s
alerts.acknowledgmentComment: Reduced mixer speed and checked gearbox.

alerts.name: Press-12 high vibration
alerts.acknowledgmentComment: Operator reduced stroke rate and checked foundation bolts.

alerts.name: South Mixing Line critical downtime > 15 min
alerts.acknowledgmentComment: Raw material blockage cleared and restart verified.

alerts.name: South Mixing Line brief critical downtime
Main Plant Line 1 low uptime (< 92%)
alerts.acknowledgmentComment: Series of micro-stops investigated; maintenance ticket raised.

alerts.name: Main Plant Line 3 low uptime (< 94%)
alerts.acknowledgmentComment: Production planner reviewing schedule and changeover losses.

alerts.name: NF-CNC-02 high hourly energy
alerts.acknowledgmentComment: Program optimized to reduce idle spindle time.

alerts.name: Plant A high average process temperature
alerts.acknowledgmentComment: Cooling tower load increased; monitoring trend on dashboards.

alerts.name: MX-204 low uptime (< 90%)
alerts.acknowledgmentComment: Extended setup time due to tooling change; documented in shift log.
